cards.back: A formal system used to represent knowledge using logical statements
The process of representing knowledge in a way that can be understood and used by computers
A statement that asserts a relationship between two entities, typically represented with a subject and a predicate
A word or phrase with a specific meaning, used to represent objects, concepts, or events in a knowledge representation system
A variable that represents the predicate in a logical statement, used to represent unknown or unspecified entities
